stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Wifredo Lam was an Afro-Cuban artist who lived in Havana and Paris.
  • The Jungle is a notable painting by Lam.
  • It blends elements of Surrealism, Cubism, and Afro-Cuban imagery.
  • This painting was completed in 1943.
stem: The student wants to indicate the year The Jungle was completed. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: While living in Havana and Paris, Lam created richly imaginative paintings.
Lam, an Afro-Cuban artist, created a notable painting.
Lam used elements of Surrealism, Cubism, and Afro-Cuban imagery.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The sentence indicates the year The Jungle was completed, stating that it was completed in 1943.

Choice A is incorrect. The sentence indicates where Lam created paintings; it doesn't indicate when the painting was completed. Choice B is incorrect. While the sentence identifies Lam as an artist who created a notable painting, it doesn't indicate when that painting was completed. Choice C is incorrect. The sentence identifies the styles Lam used; it doesn't indicate when the painting was completed.
